en_title: Bungie Developers Repeatedly Pitched a Destiny Dating Sim, but Leadership Rejected It
cn_title: Bungie屡提《命运》恋爱模拟被拒
subtitle: 年年被否
opus_summary: Bungie开发者曾制作《命运》恋爱模拟原型，但领导层以无人想要浪漫为由拒绝。团队每年尝试正式立项均遭否决，加之工作室近期削减支持并裁员，该项目恐难问世。

paragraphs.en: Bungie developers were apparently very passionate about a Destiny dating simulator, but leadership had no interest.
paragraphs.cn: Bungie的开发团队似乎对《命运》恋爱模拟游戏充满热情，但领导层对此毫无兴趣。

paragraphs.en: Former Bungie community member Liana Ruppert dropped this piece of trivia on players after seeing a fan expressing interest in a Destiny dating sim.
paragraphs.cn: 前Bungie社区成员Liana Ruppert在看到一位粉丝表达对《命运》恋爱模拟的兴趣后，向玩家们分享了这段幕后趣闻。

paragraphs.en: "Fun fact, the team actually made one, but leadership [gave a] very hard no [and felt] that nobody wanted romance or silliness. Very Dream Daddy inspired. It was fun getting to be a small part of it."
paragraphs.cn: 「说个趣事，团队其实真做了一个，但领导层坚决否决，认为没人想要浪漫或胡闹的调调。整体深受《Dream Daddy》启发。能以很小的角色参与其中，真的很有趣。」

paragraphs.en: Former Bungie senior narrative designer Robert Brookes chimed in , revealing that the concept came out of an event where the studio was allowed to prototype fun side projects for a week. However, a small group of devs continuously tried to scale it into a full-blown project.
paragraphs.cn: 前Bungie高级叙事设计师Robert Brookes也补充道，这个概念诞生于工作室过去举办的「嘉年华」活动，当时开发者会有一周时间制作各种有趣的原型。不过，一小群开发者持续尝试将其扩大为一个完整的项目。

paragraphs.en: "To be fair, the dating sim that was made was a part of the 'Carnival' event Bungie used to do, where devs had a week to make fun prototypes. So it was never a full-fledged project. That said, we did pitch that as a full-fledged project every year."
paragraphs.cn: 「老实说，那个恋爱模拟是Bungie以前搞的‘嘉年华’活动的一部分，开发者有一周时间来做有趣的原型，所以它从来不是一个正式项目。话虽如此，我们确实每年都把它作为正式项目来提案。」

paragraphs.en: Brookes also noted that two of the people who were behind the pitch came from romance game design, saying they even created a pitch deck with costs and metrics, but Bungie leadership remained uninterested. Although the idea is silly and fun, it's easy to see why Bungie was hesitant to move forward on such a project. A side project like that could easily be spun by frustrated community members as a waste of resources and time, when other parts of Destiny 2 could've used that support.
paragraphs.cn: Brookes还提到，推动这一提案的两人本身就来自恋爱游戏设计领域，他们甚至做了包含成本核算和关键指标的提案书，但Bungie高层始终不为所动。虽然这个想法听起来既荒唐又有趣，但很容易理解Bungie为什么迟迟不愿推进这种项目。这样的副项目很容易被不满的社区成员说成是浪费资源和时间，毕竟《命运2》的其他部分当时更需要这些支持。

paragraphs.en: If that sounds extreme, all you have to do is look at how Marathon has been treated by some members of the community , and that's a proper big-budget Bungie shooter. Unfortunately, it seems unlikely this dating sim will ever happen, as a lot of doubt has been cast on Bungie's future as of late. Bungie recently ended support for Destiny 2, and it has been reported that the studio will undergo "significant" layoffs as a result.
paragraphs.cn: 如果这听起来有些极端，那你只需要看看《失落星船：马拉松》是如何被部分社区成员对待的——那还是一款正儿八经的Bungie大制作射击游戏。遗憾的是，考虑到近期外界对Bungie的未来有不少疑虑，这款恋爱模拟游戏恐怕很难诞生。Bungie最近已停止支持《命运2》，并有报道称因此工作室将面临「大规模」裁员。

paragraphs.en: Similarly, Destiny 3 is not in active development , and it seems unlikely that it will happen anytime soon, given Bungie's recent performance. Smaller-scale Destiny games may be feasible, but it could be years before we see them materialize.
paragraphs.cn: 同样，《命运3》目前并未积极开发，而且从Bungie近期表现来看，这款游戏在短期内不太可能推出。规模较小的《命运》衍生作品或许还有希望，但要看到它们成真，可能还需要等上好几年。

paragraphs.en: Cade Onder is a freelancer for IGN's news team. He covers all things entertainment, including gaming, film, and more. You can find him on Twitter @Cade_Onder.
paragraphs.cn: Cade Onder是IGN新闻团队的自由撰稿人，负责报道游戏、影视等所有娱乐内容。你可以在Twitter上找到他 @Cade_Onder。
